# Fixture: donnell_wilder_login
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 11.6s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Donnell! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I'm already a partner
Concierge: Great to hear you're already a partner!
Partner: I'm trying to get back into my app and it's not letting me log in

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Tap Forgot Password on the login screen — that'll send you a reset link to get back in. If that doesn't work, submit a support ticket.
